who: construction contractors managing 5-15 field service technicians
offer: For construction contractors managing 5-15 field service technicians, inconsistent tracking of technician certifications causes compliance issues and potential project delays. We automate scheduling and tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and paper records.
problem: Inconsistent tracking of technician certifications leads to compliance issues and potential project delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Community forums sharing tools for contractors
try_it: Let users try manual entry for certifications and simple dashboard
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
